body: Rampart Casting Sp. z o.o. completed certification of its environmental management system, adding ISO14001 coverage across its Poland operations and publishing scope 1 and 2 emissions targets for the first time.
headline: Rampart Casting Sp. z o.o. earns sustainability certification

body: A process deviation at a Granite Casting s.r.o. facility in Czech Republic allowed nonconforming parts to ship for several weeks. Affected customers have been asked to quarantine inventory while sorting and rework are arranged.
headline: Quality escape at Granite Casting s.r.o. plant triggers customer containment
